titles.text: エルミナージュ DS Remix 〜闇の巫女と神々の指輪〜

descriptions.text: Elminage (エルミナージュ) is a series of Japanese fantasy role-playing video games published by Starfish SD since 2008. They are Dungeon Crawler RPGs in the tradition of the Wizardry series. It is one of the most well-regarded series in this genre.
